meaning: adj.鑳芥矇鍏ユ按涓殑,鑳芥綔姘寸殑
examples: The submersible Alvin investigates the Cayman Trough, a transform boundary on the floor of the western Caribbean Sea.
The radio\'s Mil-Spec metal housing is submersible to two meters.
A manned submersible has to meet even higher standards: it must keep its occupants alive.
On one of the submersible's first test voyages, Hawkes' team encountered a group of hammerhead sharks.
Instead of divers, remote-controlled submersible craft would have to be used, but even that poses problems.
